name: Telomerase Restoration Trial-Horizon Surveillance

scope.question: Do current Libella AAV-hTERT registry, same-window publication, or sponsor-web checks change the Telomerase Restoration outlook or clear stale local trial-watch metadata?

summary: Ran a focused Telomerase Restoration surveillance pass to reconcile the stale Libella AAV-hTERT aging registry watch record. ClinicalTrials.gov still lists NCT04133649 with unknown overall status, last-known recruiting status, no posted results, estimated primary and study completion in January 2021, and last update posted December 10, 2019. The other seven scoped telomerase registry records remain no-results context consistent with the June 10 coverage repair: two Libella disease-context AAV-hTERT registries, three historical TA-65 registries, one cycloastragenol disease-boundary registry, and one planned TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry. Same-window PubMed searches found no Libella, AAV-hTERT, TA-65, telomerase-restoration, correction, or safety result that changes the public outlook. Web search found registry mirrors, pipeline pages, and old news/context pages but no result-bearing Libella disclosure. No outlook, stage, momentum, confidence, source, finding, activity, bundle, or coverage assessment update is warranted.

materiality_decision.rationale: The stale NCT04133649 item was a local registry-check metadata gap, not a field delta. Current registry checks show no posted results and no evidence that would alter the tentative human_biomarker_signal Telomerase Restoration read. The public study metadata was refreshed only to record the June 14 registry check and structured estimated completion timing.

search_log.summary: Scoped report contained 8 registry-linked Telomerase Restoration studies, 0 missing trial-detail records, 1 stale or missing registry check, and 1 open stale watch item. The stale item was NCT04133649.

NCT04133649 remains UNKNOWN with last-known RECRUITING status, hasResults=false, five estimated participants, January 2021 estimated primary and study completion, and last update posted December 10, 2019. The other scoped telomerase records remained no-results context: NCT04133454 and NCT04110964 are unknown-status Libella disease-context AAV-hTERT registries; NCT02530255, NCT02531334, and NCT01753674 are completed or terminated no-results telomerase-activator records; NCT05598359 is not yet recruiting; and NCT02766790 remains unknown status with no posted results.

search_log.query: AAV-hTERT hTERT Libella; AAV-hTERT OR hTERT aging; TA-65 telomerase activator aging
search_log.summary: The AAV-hTERT and Libella queries returned the same three Libella registries: NCT04133649, NCT04133454, and NCT04110964, all unknown status and no posted results. The focused TA-65/telomerase activator query returned the already-recorded retinal amyloid registry NCT02530255. No new result-bearing telomerase-restoration registry was found.

search_log.query: (telomerase OR hTERT OR TA-65 OR "telomerase activator" OR AAV-hTERT OR telomere length) AND (aging OR ageing OR older OR senescence OR healthspan OR longevity) AND 2026/06/10:2026/06/14[edat]
search_log.summary: Returned 10 records. Close hits were wrong-scope, review, observational, in vitro, non-telomerase-restoration intervention, oncology, wildlife, or general biomarker context rather than a Libella, AAV-hTERT, TA-65, or human telomerase-restoration result.
Returned no NCT04133649 or Libella trial result. The returned AAV/hTERT hits were old wrong-scope oncology vector papers, not aging or Libella AAV-hTERT clinical evidence.

search_log.query: Libella AAV-hTERT aging trial results NCT04133649 2026; Libella Gene Therapeutics AAV-hTERT results aging trial; NCT04133649 Libella results
search_log.summary: Search results surfaced ClinicalTrials.gov, trial mirrors, pipeline pages, older news/context, and review pages. No current sponsor, registry, or publication page reported Libella AAV-hTERT aging trial results.

trial_watch_checks.summary: The Libella AAV-hTERT aging phase 1 registry remains unknown status, last-known recruiting, no posted results, five planned participants, and estimated completion in January 2021. Local metadata was refreshed with the June 14 registry check and structured completion month.
The Libella Alzheimer disease AAV-hTERT registry remains unknown status with last-known recruiting status and no posted results.
The Libella critical limb ischemia AAV-hTERT registry remains unknown status with last-known recruiting status and no posted results.
The cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry remains completed with no posted results.
The completed TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry remains no-results context.
The terminated TA-65 metabolic syndrome registry remains no-results context.
The TA-65 microvascular dysfunction registry remains not-yet-recruiting with no posted results.
The TA-65MD healthy-volunteer registry remains unknown status with last-known recruiting status and no posted results.

excluded_sources.title: Pistacia atlantica subsp. mutica essencial oil enhances proliferation and telomerase activity in senescent mesenchymal stem cells.
excluded_sources.reason: Same-window in vitro senescent mesenchymal stem cell paper with telomerase-activity context, not a human telomerase-restoration intervention or Libella result.

excluded_sources.title: Geroprotective Potential of Centella asiatica: Modulation of Cellular Aging.
excluded_sources.reason: Review-level botanical geroprotection context, not a result-bearing TA-65, AAV-hTERT, or telomerase-restoration source.

excluded_sources.title: Urate-Related Genetic Risk Modulates the Anti-Aging Effects of Exogenous Nucleotides: Multi-Omics Evidence From Older Adults.
excluded_sources.reason: Older-adult intervention context, but the intervention is exogenous nucleotides rather than telomerase restoration.

excluded_sources.title: DNA methylation-estimated phenotypes, telomere length, aging and risk of intracranial aneurysms: Evidence from genetic studies.
excluded_sources.reason: Genetic and biomarker association context around telomere length, not a telomerase-restoration intervention.

excluded_sources.title: Context-dependent telomere dynamics in wild fish populations under anthropogenic stress.
excluded_sources.reason: Wildlife telomere dynamics context, not human or translational telomerase-restoration evidence.

excluded_sources.reference: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT04133649 mirrors and pipeline pages
excluded_sources.title: Libella AAV-hTERT trial mirrors and pipeline summaries
excluded_sources.reason: Search returned ClinicalTrials.gov mirrors, pipeline summaries, and old news about the same unknown-status no-results registry; none added result-bearing primary evidence beyond the registry.

notes: This pass was selected manually after the global trial-watch audit showed two remaining open stale records and Libella AAV-hTERT aging was first in the report.
The delta window is anchored to the 2026-06-10 Telomerase Restoration coverage repair and the 2026-06-10 public outlook update.
No coverage assessment update is needed because the June 10 coverage repair already captured Libella AAV-hTERT and telomerase-activator no-results registry boundaries.
next_actions: Continue ordinary surveillance for posted Libella AAV-hTERT, TA-65, telomerase-activator, or TERT mRNA results and long-term telomerase safety signals.

Create a public bundle only if future evidence changes stage, evidence weight, momentum, blockers, safety, durability, human target engagement, functional outcomes, or the telomerase-restoration translation boundary.
